title: Ordinance Approving the Realignment of Funds Originally Intended for the Construction of Municipal Engineering Building to Be Erected at the Back of the Municipal Building, Barangay Timugan Amounting to Twelve Million Pesos (P 12,000,000.00) to Construction of Warehouse and Working Area with the Same Amount and Location, Thereby Amending Municipal Ordinance No. 2020-2060.
